chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS First Appeal No. S-19 of 2024 “Ramesh Kumar vs. Madan Lal” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A.No.226/ 2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 12-01-2026. Mr. Om Parkash H. Karmani advocate for the appellant. Mr. Aziz Ahmed Laghari advocate for the respondent. = After arguing the matter at some length, both the learned counsel, under instructions from their clients, state that they would be satisfied if the matter is remanded back to the learned trial Court for allowing opportunity of recording evidence to the parties subject to the payment of cost. Accordingly, by consent of the parties, the impugned judgment and decree dated 24-04-2024 passed by the learned Additional District Judge-II, Mirpurkhas, in Summary Suit No.17/ 2021 is set aside and learned trial Court is directed to record respective evidence of the parties and conclude the trial within a period of 30 days from the receipt of this Order, wherein no unnecessary adjournments shall be granted to either side. This arrangement is subject to depositing of cost of Rs.25,000/= by the appellant with the Additional Registrar of this Court, for onward disbursement to the High Court Bar Association, Mirpurkhas, specifically for the purpose of purchasing books for their library. The instant appeal is, therefore, disposed of in above terms alongwith listed application, with no order as to costs. 2 JUDGE *Saleem* 3
